items.headline: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
items.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at…

items.headline: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

items.headline: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half…

items.headline: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.headline: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
